source_excerpt: Not fit to polish the teeth of her grandmother's cat! I must rank pretty low in the consideration of Dejah Thoris, I thought; but I could not help laughing at the strange figure of speech, so homely and in this respect so earthly. It mad...

source_excerpt: "They cannot be a day's march ahead of us," he exclaimed, the light of battle leaping to his fierce face.
